modules.sql: SELECT o.overdraft_revenue, o.overdraft_count, c.credit_revenue, c.credit_count FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_waived = 0 THEN fee_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdraft_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_waived = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdraft_count FROM overdraft_events) o CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'Credit' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS credit_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'Credit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS credit_count FROM transactions) c
